nodes.name: Red-throated cliff swallow
nodes.summary: The red-throated cliff swallow (Petrochelidon rufigula), also known as the red-throated swallow, is a species of bird in the family Hirundinidae. It is found in Angola, Republic of the Congo, DRC, Gabon, and Zambia. Gallery References

nodes.name: Red-throated cliff swallow
nodes.summary: Red-throated cliff swallow（Petrochelidon rufigula）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Red-throated cliff swallow。

nodes.name: Petrochelidon
nodes.summary: Petrochelidon（Petrochelidon）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如紅海燕、South African cliff swallow、Preuss's cliff swallow等10种鸟类。
